heading: Aggregate gross compensation of employee of Senator of State with population under 5,000,000
label: 4581 Aggregate gross compensation of employee of Senator of State with population under 5,000,000
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 61–1c of this titleSection is from the Congressional Operations Appropriations Act, 1992, which is title I of the Legislative Branch Appropriations Act, 1992.

children.label: a
children.text: Notwithstanding the provisions of , and except as otherwise provided in subparagraph (C) of such subsection (d)(1), the aggregate of gross compensation paid employees in the office of a Senator shall not exceed during each fiscal year $1,012,083 if the population of his State is less than 5,000,000.section 4575(d)(1) of this title
